overview: MediRemind is a smart medicine reminder web app with full Web Push notification support, user profiles, medicine lookup, adherence analytics, and dose history — all backed by an ICP blockchain canister.
features: Web Push notifications that fire even when the app is closed
Push subscription management in the Profile tab (enable/disable)
Backend-powered VAPID push delivery via canister HTTP outcalls
Reminder scheduling with voice and browser alerts
User profiles with photo upload up to 5MB
Medicine lookup with AI summaries via OpenFDA and Hugging Face
PWA installable on Android as home screen app
